Saƙa kan farawa

entries.source: Prompt the learner's next step, inspect their work, and escalate hints gradually.
entries.value: Saƙo the mai koyo's na gaba mataki, bincika nasu work, da escalate alamomi gradually.

entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Na jama’a explanation na yanayin baƙo, na sirri chats, manufar crawler, mai koyo safety, da makaranta amincewa.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a give anyone a mai amfani place don fara, while makaranta da partner deployments can adapt the experience don local yana buƙatar.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: Na jama’a yanayin baƙo URLs exist don haka masu koyo can land directly a cikin mai amfani yanayoyin koyo daga bincike, social hanyoyi, makarantu, da injinan amsar AI.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Shafukan koyon jama'a crawler zai iya karantawa; hirarraki masu zaman kansu da aka ajiye, asusu, kayan admin, da bayanan mai amfani ba wuraren ganowa ba ne.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Na jama’a learning ya kamata be discoverable ba tare da making na sirri chats na jama’a.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Na jama’a modes suna tuned don explanations, Socratic tambayoyi, alamomi, mataki bincike, tambayoyi, da bita.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a suna bude don bincike da AI retrieval crawlers, while admin kayan aiki, API hanyoyi, reset gudanarwa, da na sirri utilities suna ba a yarda ba.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a don fannoni, na sirri chats don masu koyo.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a show samfuri hali, not na sirri dalibi work.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Shafukan jama’a, batu chats, hanyoyin koyo, blog jagorori, da ikon tushe shafuka suna intended don be discoverable.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: Na jama’a batu URLs let searches such as AI Socratic malami, AI aikin gida koci, AI katin tunatarwa mai gina, da talk don na tarihi figures AI land directly a cikin the matching mode.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Quality learning ya kamata feel available, human, da alive.

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Tambayoyi expose assumptions da gaps, don haka the mai koyo builds the amsa maimakon copying one.
Tambayoyi masu koyo tambaya

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: Tambayoyi suna sa ka bayyana samfurinka na batun, inda rudani, karfin gwiwa na karya, da ra'ayoyin farko da suka bace yawanci suke bayyana.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Tambayoyi dole ne have 4 amsa zaɓuɓɓuka, one correct amsa, concise explanations, da no amsa leakage.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Tambayoyi reveal the siffa na confusion. Wani mai koyo might know a formula amma not lokacin da don amfani da it. su might tuna a na tarihi gaskiya amma not fahimci the cause. su might have a mai ƙarfi opinion amma weak shaida.
Amsoshi masu sauri
Tambayoyi kafin rereading

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.

Abokin Karatu

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Abokin Karatu yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Bring a passage ko book ra’ayi da gina comprehension ta hanyar taƙaitawa, kalmomi, inference, da discussion.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Yanayin Wasan Kwaikwayo yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Atisaye negotiation, conflict, customer tallafi, leadership, ko any high-stakes conversation.

entries.value: Gudanar da tsarin karatu na rukuni don abokai ko abokan karatu tare da buri, dubawa, da tambayoyin tattaunawa da aka daidaita.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: Run a Socratic thinking environment inda the mai koyo discovers fahimta ta hanyar disciplined questioning rather fiye da marar aiki explanation.

entries.value: Run an adaptive lesson canvas inda the mai koyo acts early da the interface canje-canje a kusa da nasu shaida na fahimta.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Makarantu da abokan hulɗa can gina daga the na jama’a samfuri toward tailored, confidential, da subsidized deployments.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Makarantu can tantance inspir ta hanyar yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a farko, sannan bincika tailored koyon AI spaces tare da na musamman tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, curriculum yana buƙatar, da samun dama da aka tallafa hanyoyi.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can tantance na jama’a modes farko, sannan discuss tailored tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, abun ciki yana buƙatar, da samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: Makarantu za su iya bayar da kwarewar hira ta AI mai farar alama wadda aka daidaita da masu koyonsu, ciki har da abun ciki da tsarin aiki masu dacewa da NCERT, tare da amfani da makarantu abokan hulda ko tallafin CSR suka dauki nauyi.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can fara ta trying the na jama’a modes, sannan move toward a tailored version lokacin da su buƙata na musamman tsarukan aiki, abun ciki alignment, ko samun dama da aka tallafa.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Makarantu can gwada yanayoyin baƙo na jama’a farko, sannan amfani da the makarantu shafi don bincika tailored tsarukan aiki, sirri tsarawa, NCERT-aligned zaɓuɓɓuka, da samun dama da aka tallafa.
Abokin Aikin dakin Gwaje-gwaje na Kimiyya

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Abokin Dakin Gwajin Kimiyya yanayin koyo ne na AI mai mayar da hankali; ana amfani da AI don koyo maimakon tara amsoshi kawai. An gina yanayin a kan aiki takamaimai: Tsara safe demonstrations, fahimci variables, predict outcomes, da reason daga shaida like a scientist.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Kimiyya Lab Partner Yanayin Koyo na AI: jagora mai amfani

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop
entries.value: Saƙonnin Abokin Dakin Gwajin Kimiyya da madaukin karatu
kimiyya malami AI

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Injin bincike yana ganin shafuka. Masu koyo suna bukatar jerin matakai. Wadannan hanyoyi suna hada yanayin jama'a zuwa zagayen karatu masu amfani don fahimta, aikin gida, shirin jarabawa, da bincike.
Nufin bincike
Bincike shafukan sauka

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Bincike shafuka, injinan amsar AI, da masu koyo all get the same promise: na jama’a, mai amfani, madaidaitan wuraren shiga that bude directly inside the learning experience.
